info1.description: A vintage photograph of a yellow archery target with red rings and a bullseye, adorned with arrows, set against a serene backdrop of trees and a clear sky.

info2.description: A spacious dining room with a high ceiling and chandelier, featuring multiple tables and chairs covered in purple tablecloths, and a colorful mural on the left wall, with a divided floor and an empty, well-lit space.
